name: Ratatouille Nicoise
recipeIngredient: 2 or more garlic cloves, peeled and chopped
2 green peppers, seeded and cut into strips
salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet.
2. Add the garlic and onion; sauté until the onion is transparent.
3. Slice the zucchini and peel and cube the eggplant.
4. Lightly flour the eggplant pieces.
5. Add the squash, eggplant, and green peppers to the skillet.
6. Cover and cook slowly for about one hour.
7. Add the tomatoes and simmer, uncovered, until the mixture thickens.
8. Season with salt and pepper.
9. Add the capers during the last fifteen minutes of cooking.
10. Serve hot or cold.
Yield: 5 to 6 servings
